channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iran live updates: Tehran says strait is closed after deadly attacks on Lebanon
item.description: President Donald Trump announced major combat operations against Iran on Feb. 28, with large-scale joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: 6/20: Saturday Morning
item.description: Questions arise over the U.S.-Iran deal as Israel and Lebanon exchange strikes. Meanwhile, the Ebola crisis worsens in parts of Africa.

item.title: Kennedy Center board still weighing closure and renovation, no programming scheduled
item.description: The Kennedy Center says it is still considering closing for a full-scale renovation as it reviews options, including staying open while...

item.title: Iran says it is closing Strait of Hormuz again as Hezbollah and Israel trade attacks
item.description: Iran's military accused the U.S. of not upholding the first point in the memorandum of understanding, with Israel remaining in Lebanese territory.
